title: Browser Dwell Time Event Payload
description: Schema for the payload of browser.dwell_time events tracking time spent on a webpage

host.description: The hostname of the page (e.g., www.example.com)

pathHash.description: SHA-256 hash of the URL path for privacy-preserving tracking

dwellTimeMs.description: Total time spent on the page in milliseconds

activeTimeMs.description: Time the page was actively in focus in milliseconds

idleTimeMs.description: Time the page was idle or unfocused in milliseconds

scrollEvents.description: Number of scroll events during the dwell

clickEvents.description: Number of click events during the dwell

keyEvents.description: Number of keyboard events during the dwell

maxScrollDepthPercent.description: Maximum scroll depth reached as a percentage of page height

visibilityChanges.description: Number of times page visibility changed

exitReason.description: Reason for ending the dwell tracking

titleHash.description: SHA-256 hash of the page title

contentType.description: MIME type of the page content

incognito.description: Whether the page was viewed in incognito/private mode
